WINDOW: 383.233s to 419.067s (smile at 403.233s to 404.067s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[157.080-434.930] interviewee: the medical corps was SAT, Sanitary. When they brought SAP, SAP are the sappers. And I had to serve for two years with the pioneers building bridges and pontoons. And we learned how to mine bridges and highways. And I couldn't get out. I tried a few times to change. But it was impossible. I had to stay there.

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
And
